jobs.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer — Canva AI
jobs.why: Canva Canva AI 团队放出的 Senior MLE 岗位；AU 最顶尖本土独角兽，直接做 GenAI/LLM 产品（RAG、fine-tuning、diffusion model 全覆盖）；学员当前不一定够得着，但目标感极强。

jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer Graduate, Trust and Safety Engineering — 2026 Start
jobs.why: TikTok Graduate 2026，明确要求应届或毕业 1 年内的 CS/工程专业，薪资 $140K-$170K；Bootcamp 毕业生完成 Phase 4 NLP/内容安全分类项目后可直接投，滚动录取越早越好。

jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer, 2026 Graduate — Australia & New Zealand
jobs.why: Atlassian Grad++ Program 是 12 个月结构化培训计划，ML Engineer 专向岗，ANZ 应届毕业生（PR 或公民）滚动申请开放至 June 2026；是少数对 ML 初学者开放的顶级全球科技大厂入门通道，入职门槛低于正式岗位。

alternativeCandidates.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer — Inspire & Create (AU Remote)
alternativeCandidates.note: Same Canva MLE band as aspirational pick but AU-remote friendly; good backup if Sydney role closes.

alternativeCandidates.title: Machine Learning Engineer — Data / AI Research
alternativeCandidates.note: Mid-level Canva MLE in Data/AI Research; one step below Senior, better target for learners 12–18 months post-bootcamp.

alternativeCandidates.title: Machine Learning Engineer Intern, Data Trust & Safety (Australia) — 2026 Start
alternativeCandidates.note: Intern variant of the actionable pick; current students (not yet graduated) should target this instead of the graduate role.

alternativeCandidates.title: Machine Learning Engineer Intern — Summer 2026/27 (Dec–Feb)
alternativeCandidates.note: 12-week full-time summer program Dec 2026 – Feb 2027; excellent for students graduating mid-2027.

alternativeCandidates.title: AI Engineer
alternativeCandidates.note: ASX-listed AU fintech (revenue $250M+), newly formed AI team — high ownership, accessible experience bar. Good target 6–12 months post-bootcamp.

alternativeCandidates.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer — AI Foundations
alternativeCandidates.note: Kraken is a certified Great Place to Work in AU; Senior ML role building core AI/ML capabilities. Strong brand in crypto-tech.

alternativeCandidates.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer — AI Enablement (AU Remote)
alternativeCandidates.note: Canva AI Platform group; AI Enablement team provides ML tooling to internal researchers and AI builders — infrastructure/MLOps skew.
